nodes.name: Watch Promotix Emails
nodes.notes: Configure IMAP credentials for the inbox that receives Promotix guestlist emails. Sender: no-reply@mg.promotix.com.au. Subject pattern: 'Guestlist for {EVENT}, {VENUE}, {STATE}, {DATE} {TIME}'

nodes.name: Parse Subject Metadata
nodes.notes: Extracts event name, venue, state, date, and time from the Promotix email subject line. The CSV attachment doesn't contain this metadata so we must parse it from the subject.

nodes.name: Parse Promotix CSV
nodes.notes: Reads and parses the CSV attachment using this.helpers.getBinaryDataBuffer(). Handles the Quantity format ('2 General Admission' → 2). Event metadata (name, date, time) comes from the subject parser, not the CSV.

nodes.name: Match Event & Session
nodes.notes: Calls the match_event_session RPC to find the matching event_id and session_id. Uses the same RPC function as the SFF workflow.

nodes.name: Upsert Customer to CRM
nodes.notes: Upserts the attendee into the customers CRM table. Uses Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates to match on email. Source set to 'promotix' for new customers.

nodes.name: Insert Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: Inserts the ticket entry. Unique index on booking_reference prevents duplicates (409 Conflict).

nodes.name: Errors - Review Needed
nodes.notes: Add a Slack or email notification here to alert when Promotix imports have errors.
